results.question: Is TipTap correctly integrated with SSR safety?

evidence.findings: immediatelyRender: false set in useEditor config. NotesEditorClient loaded via dynamic import with ssr:false in NotesTab. Fix applied after discovering TipTap v3 SSR error during E2E test.

results.examiner_notes: SSR fix confirmed by E2E tests passing.

results.question: Does toolbar provide all 6 formatting controls with ARIA labels?

evidence.findings: Bold (aria-label='Bold'), Italic (aria-label='Italic'), H1 (aria-label='Heading 1'), H2 (aria-label='Heading 2'), UL (aria-label='Bullet list'), OL (aria-label='Ordered list'). All 6 confirmed in E2E test 2.

results.examiner_notes: All toolbar buttons present with ARIA labels.

evidence.findings: DEBOUNCE_MS = 500. debounceTimer.current ref cleared and reset on each onUpdate call. Cleanup on unmount via useEffect.

results.question: Do notes persist after page refresh?

evidence.findings: updateNotes writes to lp_progress_v1.byTopicSlug[slug].notesHtml. useTopicProgress reads on mount. E2E test 4 confirms: type text, wait 1s, refresh, content persists.
writeTopicProgress uses slug as key in byTopicSlug record. E2E test 5 confirms JS notes don't appear in World History topic.

results.question: Do all 5 Story 04 E2E tests pass?

evidence.findings: 5/5 tests pass in 11.7s: toolbar visible (1), ARIA labels (2), typing and save status (3), persistence (4), per-topic isolation (5).

results.examiner_notes: All tests pass after fixing TipTap SSR issue.

results.question: Does editor load without runtime errors?

evidence.findings: Error was: 'Tiptap Error: SSR has been detected, please set immediatelyRender explicitly to false'. Fixed by adding immediatelyRender: false. E2E tests now complete without runtime error overlay.

test_gate.evidence: Build: 10 pages compiled. 0 TypeScript errors. TipTap v3.20.0 installed.

patterns.pattern_description: TipTap v3 requires immediatelyRender: false for SSR environments. This was a breaking change from v2. The editor was causing a runtime error that prevented any tab interaction.

issues_addressed.issue: TipTap v3 SSR error: 'please set immediatelyRender explicitly to false'
issues_addressed.action_taken: Added immediatelyRender: false to useEditor config in NotesEditorClient.tsx
issues_addressed.fix_rationale: TipTap v3 explicitly requires this option for Next.js SSR compatibility
issues_addressed.prevention_measure: Dynamic import with ssr:false also applied
issues_addressed.evidence: E2E tests now pass without runtime error overlay
